query: Five Below job posting (artificial intelligence OR machine learning OR generative AI OR LLM OR data scientist)

results.title: AI Architect Job in Philadelphia | Five Below, In.c
highlights:
AI Architect Job in Philadelphia | Five Below, In.c
...
# AI Architect
...
- We require 9+ years of experience in software, data, or AI engineering, including at least 5 years in AI/ML architecture roles. - We require proven delivery of production AI solutions in retail, e-commerce, supply chain, or other consumer-facing environments; this background is mandatory. - We need deep, hands-on experience with the open-source AI/ML stack, such as Hugging Face Transformers, LangChain, LlamaIndex, MLflow, Ray, Feast, Evidently, or similar tools. - We expect strong Python skills along with practical experience using ML frameworks such as PyTorch, TensorFlow, and scikit-learn. - We look for experience with modern data architectures, including lakehouse, streaming, and batch processing, as well as platforms like Databricks and Snowflake. - We require demonstrated ability to design AI observability solutions, including model monitoring, drift detection, and production feedback loops. - We need working knowledge of AI security threats, including prompt injection, adversarial attacks, and secure LLM deployment practices. - We require hands-on experience with cloud platforms and managed AI/ML services such as AWS SageMaker, Azure ML, Vertex AI, or equivalent. - We expect a track record of using AI productivity tools such as Copilot, Cursor, Claude, Glean, or similar platforms in day-to-day architecture and engineering work. - We need excellent communication skills and the ability to explain complex technical designs to both technical and business audiences. - We prefer experience building or scaling enterprise AI platforms or AI Centers of Excellence. - We value contributions to open-source AI projects or published architecture patterns. - We prefer experience with AI red-teaming, adversarial testing, or formal AI risk assessment frameworks. - We value familiarity with retail systems such as Manhattan WMS, Blue Yonder, Aptos POS, or Salesforce Commerce Cloud. - Cloud or AI certifications such as AWS ML Specialty, Azure AI Engineer, or Google Cloud Platform Professional ML Engineer are a plus.

results.title: Sanath Chilakala
highlights:

...
Director of Artificial Intelligence at [Five Below](https://www.linkedin.com/company/five-below)
...
As a seasoned Director of Data Architecture with 19 years of extensive experience, I specialize in architecting and implementing complex data solutions tailored for the Healthcare, Life Insurance, and Finance sectors. My expertise encompasses Digital Solution Architecture, Advanced Data Engineering, Data Governance, Artificial Intelligence, Data Analytics, and Regulatory Reporting, with a strong emphasis on regulatory compliance and data integrity. I possess niche skills in AI model development and deployment, including proficiency in natural language processing (NLP) and machine learning (ML) algorithms that enhance predictive analytics capabilities. In Data Architecture, I excel in designing cloud-native architectures, implementing data lakes, and optimizing data warehousing solutions. My Data Governance expertise includes establishing frameworks for data stewardship, data quality management, and compliance with regulations such as GDPR and HIPAA. Throughout my career, I have successfully developed scalable data models and architectures that support real-time analytics and machine learning initiatives, driving enhanced decision-making and operational efficiencies. In the Healthcare industry, I have led projects that align data governance practices with regulatory standards, ensuring the protection of sensitive patient information while maximizing the utility of health data for clinical insights. ### Director of Artificial Intelligence at [Five Below](https://www.linkedin.com/company/five-below) (Current)
...
At the helm of Digital Transformation, Data Modernization and AI/ ML evolution at NTT, I lead the data and analytics portfolio in delivering the Global Insurance Digital Platform and the SmarT Data Platform. The platform is a cloud-based, digital platform and partner ecosystem that provides best-in-class consulting, partnerships, Business Process as a Service (BPaaS), third-party administration, and technological capabilities to the life and annuity Industry. Managing over 7 million policies, GIDP's componentized approach connects seamlessly via event-based APIs and is built on a strong foundation of deep industry knowledge, BPO, infrastructure, security, compliance, and automation. The ecosystem provides immediate access to our wide array of industry-leading, global, and regional partners—offering turnkey solutions across the value chain. The SmarT Data Platform a next-generation intelligent analytics and AI/Deep learning data platform that currently supports 1.5 million policies for Fortune 500 clients and eventually evolving into the integral core of our entire digital ecosystem. This groundbreaking solution seamlessly integrates data from multiple complex policy administration systems, transforming fragmented information silos into a unified, accessible resource that serves as the single source of truth for all enterprise data needs.

### Data Engineer at [Five Below](https://www.linkedin.com/company/five-below) (Current)
...

...
Grateful and excited to have spoken at the first ever Postman User Group Meetup hosted at the Microsoft campus in Hyderabad! 🎤✨  

It was fantastic to explore how LLMs can integrate seamlessly into real-world API pipelines - spanning Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) to the Model Context Protocol (MCP), which is rapidly becoming a unifying standard for enabling AI agents to communicate with tools and APIs. ⚙️  

As part of my session, I demonstrated how 'Postman Flows' can enable multiple AI agents to collaborate within a single flow - orchestrating both local AI agents (tunneled thru ngrok) and cloud-based AI agents for real coordination. The demo also included deploying a Postman MCP server (cloud) and connecting it through Cursor IDE, bridging modern AI workflows directly with Postman’s ecosystem. 🎯 

We also discussed:
...
- Building AI-driven API pipelines without compromising security.  
- Managing secrets safely with Postman Vault instead of hardcoding keys.  
- Implementing FQL-based guardrails to counter prompt injection and data poisoning.  
- Combining AI precision with legacy system flexibility to design adaptive architectures.  

The best part? The incredible community energy! Every conversation reflected deep curiosity and passion for innovation. A huge shoutout to Aanchal Mishra , Ankit Jain ⋅ 🐝 and special appreciation to Tanmaiyee Vadloori for flawlessly organizing the Postman's first-ever meetup - a tremendous success! 🙌  

The evolution from Code‑First → API‑First → Agent‑First marks an exciting shift in how we design intelligent systems. Energized to keep learning, experimenting, and contributing as this journey continues. 🚀 #Postman #PostmanUserGroup #PostmanFlows #MCP #RAG #AI #APIs #AgentFirst #HyderabadTech #TechCommunity #LearningJourney #OpenSource
...
🚀 MERN, AI, and everything in between: The future developer’s playbook
...
What an experience! I recently had the privilege of connecting with a brilliant community to share insights on “BEAT THE INTERVIEW: Break the Limits — A MERN Stack Developer’s Guide to Getting Hired in the AI Era.” 🎉 

We explored everything from Vanilla JavaScript wizardry 🪄 to agentic AI 🤖 - and somewhere between “closures” and “context engineering,” it became clear: the developers shaping the future aren’t just coding apps, they’re architecting AI-augmented systems.
...
When someone asked, “Should I learn AI or MERN first?” — my response: Learn both, but remember, AI still expects good JavaScript manners.

# Senior, Data Scientist
...
Sunnyvale, CAHybridSeniorML / AI
...
Senior ML engineer on Walmart's Catalog Data Science team building production GenAI and deep learning models for product attribute extraction, classification, and catalog optimization at petabyte scale.
...
About Team The Catalog Data Science Team at Walmart Global Tech is focused on using the latest research in generative AI (GenAI), artificial intelligence (AI), machine learning (ML), statistics, deep learning, computer vision and optimization to implement solutions that ensure Walmart’s product catalog is accurate, complete, and optimized for customer experience. Our team tackles complex data science and ML engineering challenges related to product classification, attribute extraction, trust & safety, and catalog optimization, empowering next-generation retail use cases. We take pride in writing solid production code in Python, deploying and supporting model services and pipelines, and pushing the boundaries in latency, throughput, and scalability.
...
As a Senior Data Scientist (Machine Learning Engineer) on the Catalog Data Quality team, you will collaborate with other Data Scientists and ML Engineers to develop, deploy, and scale machine learning models in production to extract attributes from product information. You will play a key role in supporting the attribute extraction platform and catalog data quality solutions — adding capabilities and driving adoption of GenAI-powered solutions to increase the coverage and accuracy of the Walmart's product catalog. The Data Science and ML Engineering community at Walmart Global Tech is active in most of the Hack events, utilizing the petabytes of data at our disposal, to build some of the coolest ideas. All the work we do at Walmart Global Tech will eventually benefit our operations & our associates, helping Customers Save Money to Live Better.
...
- Design, develop, and deploy AI/ML, NLP, LLM models into production environments with a focus on reliability and scalability. Own the full model lifecycle — from experimentation and offline evaluation through serving, monitoring, and iterative improvement in production.

...
- Strong foundation in classical ML, deep learning, and modern architectures — CNNs, Transformers, and domain-specific variants

# AI Data Scientist
...
Burlington Stores, Inc. is a growing company committed to being an employer of choice. They are seeking a Junior AI Data Scientist to support various business areas by analyzing data and developing AI-driven solutions to enhance retail operations and customer experiences.
...
### Responsibilities
...
- Work with stakeholders throughout the organization including Merchandising, Allocations, Marketing, IT and Supply Chain Analytics to assist in developing and implementing AI-powered solutions
- Mine and analyze structured and unstructured data from the data warehouse
- Support prompt engineering and optimization for large language models (LLMs)
- Integrate AI services via APIs and cloud AI platforms
- Keep up to date with latest technology trends
- Work closely with senior data scientists to expand technical and functional knowledge as well as apply best practices
- Coordinate with different functional teams to identify AI automation opportunities
- Develop processes and tools to monitor and analyze model performance and data accuracy
- Translate complex analytical findings into clear business recommendations
...
- Bachelor's degree in AI, Data Science, Computer Science, or related field
- 0–2 years of experience in AI, data analytics, or related technical role
- Knowledge in Large Language Models (LLMs), Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG), and AI model evaluation concepts
- Exposure to cloud AI platforms (Azure AI, AWS AI services, or GCP Vertex AI)
- 2+ years Data Science experience with extensive background in building ML models, data mining and statistical analysis
- Strong interpersonal and relationship building skills
- Strong written and verbal communication skills

## Job description
...
Google's software engineers develop the next-generation technologies that change how billions of users connect, explore, and interact with information and one another. Our products need to handle information at massive scale, and extend well beyond web search. We're looking for engineers who bring fresh ideas from all areas, including information retrieval, distributed computing, large-scale system design, networking and data storage, security, artificial intelligence, natural language processing, UI design and mobile; the list goes on and is growing every day. As a software engineer, you will work on a specific project critical to Google’s needs with opportunities to switch teams and projects as you and our fast-paced business grow and evolve. We need our engineers to be versatile, display leadership qualities and be enthusiastic to take on new problems across the full-stack as we continue to push technology forward.
...
